title: sciadopityaceae
intro: The taxonomical rank Sciadopityaceae is a family of coniferous plants. It is a group of woody plants that are typically evergreen and have needle-like leaves, often found in mountainous regions. The Sciadopityaceae family is relatively small, consisting of a single genus with a few species that are native to East Asia. One of the most well-known species within this family is the Japanese umbrella pine (Sciadopitys verticillata).
